designSystem.style: Clean utility-forward design with a vibrant emerald-green accent, soft surfaces, and card-based layouts. Combines urgent status indicators with calming recovery visuals. Timeline-driven recovery paths with micro-interactions and contextual AI nudges.

screens: Today — Day health score, active disruptions list, quick recovery mode picker, context-aware nudge banner
Recovery — Scrollable timeline plan with checkable steps, energy level toggle (low/medium/high), AI insight chips, regenerate CTA
Nearby — Mini map with optimized route overlay, filterable place list with fit-score badges and context descriptions
Settings — User profile, adaptive learning progress bar, preference tag cloud, integration toggles, theme switcher
